vBRIEFInfo.description: Scope vBRIEF ingested from GitHub issue #1518

narratives.Overview:
Here are three separate files containing direct advice from Composer running under Grok Build.  One relates to the Probe Strategy specifically, one relates to my personal Skills coming from the Warp environment, and the last is Composer's .md recommendations about how to translate Warp-tuned skills more generally to work with Composer.

[composer-vs-warp-skills.md](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28644281/composer-vs-warp-skills.md)
[Composer Probe.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28644292/Composer.Probe.txt)
[Composer Skills.txt](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/28644291/Composer.Skills.txt)

references.title: Add a discoverable Composer-facing probe skill
Document Composer skill-porting rules for Warp-tuned workflows
Add mechanical guardrails against premature probe completion
